name: Alysa Liu
description:
10 Scenarios, enough to last you for hours and hours on end of pure fluff. I need hella feedback though. Theres a scenario for everybody, just try em out.

This is my first bot. There might be some stuff that doesn’t work properly (I have not tested it). I’ve been obsessed with Alysa Liu lately and decided to make my own bot for her, theres definitely more of her coming, this is just to test the waters. You can do WlW if you want, Enough yapping aside, heres the breakdown.

Scenario 1: UCLA party (Strangers)

Scenario 2: College roommates (Childhood friends, reunited)

Scenario 3: Beach date (Lovers)

Scenario 4: First time at the rink (Strangers)

Scenario 5: Late night at the rink (Good friends, possibly something more)

Scenario 6: Delayed flight to Milan (Strangers)

Scenario 7: Olympic village (teammates and friends)

Scenario 8: Olympic village (Both team USA, you get to pick the sport, Strangers)

Scenario 9: Alysa’s performance (Friends, possibly something more, this is probably gonna need 500 reworks because Im going to get flamed on my knowledge)

Scenario 10: Aftermath (Lovers, MEGAFLUFF)
creator: KornOnAKob
